title: T-043 — UI: PLN-040 Supplier List + PLN-041 Supplier Detail (master data)
prompt:
Build the Supplier List and Supplier Detail screens at `/planning/suppliers` and `/planning/suppliers/[id]` per `design/04-PLANNING-BASIC-UX.md` PLN-040/PLN-041.

List screen (`src/app/(planning)/suppliers/page.tsx`, Server Component):
- Searchable table (debounced 300ms, persists ?search= in URL).
- Status filter chip group (All / Active / Inactive) persists ?status= in URL.
- Columns: code, name, country, currency, payment_terms, lead_time_days, is_active badge, last_modified.
- Row click → navigate to /planning/suppliers/[id].
- Top-right `Add Supplier` button → opens drawer/dialog calling T-042 createSupplier.
- Pagination via shadcn DataTable.

Detail screen (`src/app/(planning)/suppliers/[id]/page.tsx`, Server Component shell + client form):
- Form fields: name, code (read-only after create), country (Combobox of ISO-3166 alpha-2), currency (Combobox ISO-4217), email, phone (E.164 mask), payment_terms (Select), lead_time_days (number), tax_code, is_active toggle, notes (Textarea).
- Zod resolver mirroring server-side validators; client-side blocks invalid format before submit.
- Save button calls T-042 updateSupplier; toggle inactive calls toggleSupplierActive with confirm dialog.
- Show D365 sync status badge (synced/drift/manual/conflict) — read-only.
- Sub-table for supplier_products is OUT OF SCOPE here — implemented in T-044 and embedded as a separate tab.

RBAC: `planning.suppliers.read` to view; `planning.suppliers.write` to mutate. Show read-only state otherwise.

RED RTL tests:
- List: search debounces and updates URL; status chip filters rows; Add Supplier opens dialog.
- Detail: invalid country rejected before submit; valid save calls updateSupplier action; toggle inactive shows confirm.

Do NOT implement supplier_products table here. Do NOT bypass Server Action validation. Do NOT import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui.

Close-out: paste RTL output + URL state behavior screenshots paths + parity check vs PLN-040/041 prototypes.

pipeline_inputs.description: Supplier list (search + status filter + add) and supplier detail (master-data form) screens.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Components fetch via T-042 listSuppliers / getSupplier; client form uses RHF + Zod resolver; URL state via searchParams; status badge for D365 sync. Sub-table for products in T-044 (separate tab in detail).
acceptance_criteria: Given the user types in search, when 300 ms elapse without further input, then the URL updates with ?search=... and the table re-renders filtered.
Given the user picks the Inactive status chip, when state settles, then URL contains ?status=inactive and only is_active=false rows render.
Given the user opens Add Supplier and submits with country='POLAND', when validated, then submit is blocked with an ISO-3166 error message.
Given a valid edit on detail, when Save is clicked, then updateSupplier Server Action is invoked with the dirty fields only.
Given a user without planning.suppliers.write, when on detail, then form fields render disabled and Save is hidden.
Given `pnpm vitest run` for the new test files, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit` and `pnpm lint`, when run, then 0 errors.
test_strategy: RED RTL tests for list (search debounce, status chip, add dialog) and detail (invalid format block, save call, RBAC disabled).
risk_red_lines: Do not call DB directly from the client — only via Server Actions.
Do not duplicate Zod schemas — import from T-042.
